Secret number one is eat more to lose more. Okay. We've been told and guys back when I was 180 pounds at five foot two and I had a food addiction and I didn't know where to start. I didn't know what to do and I was like, I want to lose weight. I want to get healthy. Right. And I was in this downward spiral of a life. Like I was told so much crap. Right. We're told so much crap that we don't even know up from down. And so I just like set out like what is the truth? What's going to help me? Right. So the first thing that you need to know is that you need to eat more to lose more because we've been told that we need to cut our calories that we need to eat 900 calories a day that we need to like eat nothing and never get the food that we love. Right. Yeah. Like that's what we've been told and it's not true. Okay. It's not true because it's not about counting the calories. It's about the source of the calories. Okay. It's about getting nutrients in your body. It's about having your vegetables and your complex carbs and your proteins and stuff that actually fuels your body because we eat for purpose, not pleasure. And let me tell you, there's a big difference in having 1500 calories worth of Oreos and 1500 calories worth of vegetables. Right. There's a big difference. So it's not about counting the calories. It's about the source of those calories. The next thing is we've been told that we have to give up going out to eat to lose weight. Like what the heck man? Like that was my favorite thing ever. Right. I was like, well, I'm just not going to lose weight. Like I don't want to be healthy if I have to give up going out to eat. That's my favorite thing to do and still is. And the truth is you just need to learn how to order. Okay. You need to learn how to order the meals, what to leave off, what to put on and you can still go out to eat. Okay. And so the truth is that complex carbs have been wrapped into the bad reputation of simple carbs, the ones that spike your insulin, like make you gain fat, like complex carbs, your body needs to operate.
